risk_title: Security constraints limiting project area access and implementation pace
risk_summary: Security challenges are directly impeding project implementation across core activities including school infrastructure, grants, and teacher development, resulting in slower-than-planned progress.
evidence_quote: Despite challenges related to security and access to the project areas, the project is advancing steadily in implementation of the core activities across school infrastructure, grants, and teacher development, although in slower pace than planned.

risk_title: Political and governance fragility affecting implementation capacity
risk_summary: Political and governance risks remain substantial and are constraining the project's ability to achieve development objectives on schedule, contributing to the moderately unsatisfactory implementation progress rating.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance [Risk Rating] Substantial [at Approval] Substantial [Last Approved Rating] Substantial [Proposed Rating]

risk_title: Institutional capacity constraints in conflict-affected federal member states
risk_summary: Implementation challenges across multiple federal member states (Galmudug, Hirshabelle, Jubbaland, Southwest) suggest institutional capacity limitations in fragile governance contexts, affecting school construction and supervision activities.
evidence_quote: Phase II: 50 sites identified; E&S assessments completed for 37 sites (Galmudug 11, Hirshabelle 9, Jubbaland 8, Southwest 9). BRA assessments completed and pending submission.
